content.en:
The deep spring liquid was continuously absorbed into Ye Tian's body, slowly raising the level of life.

In order to quickly absorb the deep spring liquid, Ye Tian also urged the life to absorb this Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment.

Life Absorption was copied from the Life Guhe, and now it is used to absorb and refine the deep spring liquid, and the effect is actually very good.

"That's right, with the Life Absorbing Origin Dao Ancestral Endowment, I should be able to quickly absorb the refining deep spring liquid!"

Soon, Ye Tian had absorbed the deep spring liquid here.

"Go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian fled and then went to other places.

As time passed, Ye Tian absorbed a lot of deep spring liquid.

However, the quality of these deep spring liquids on the periphery was not high, and Ye Tian's life level was relatively high, so the effect was not very good.

After absorbing enough deep spring liquid, no matter how much you absorb, it will be difficult to improve your life level.

"You have to go deep into the deep spring abyss and absorb the higher quality deep spring liquid!"

After Ye Tian made this decision, he immediately retreated into the deeper deep spring abyss.

The suppression in the depths of the Deep Spring Abyss is also getting stronger and stronger, and the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor will stay shorter when he comes here.

However, Ye Tian used life to absorb the deep spring liquid very quickly, so he didn't worry about time.

......

Deep in the depths of the abyss.

Ye Tian came here and quickly found a very high-quality deep spring liquid.

And there are also a lot of half-step sevenfold ancestors here, and everyone is slowly absorbing the energy of the deep spring liquid.

Fortunately, there are also a lot of deep spring liquids here, and the speed at which the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor absorbs and refines is very slow, so there will be no conflict between them.

Ye Tian searched for a while, and finally found a high-quality deep spring liquid that did not have a half-step sevenfold original ancestor refining.

Immediately, Ye Tian occupied this place and began to refine and absorb the deep spring liquid here to improve his life level.

As soon as he refined, Ye Tian was overjoyed.

"It's a high-quality deep spring liquid, and the effect is much better than the peripheral deep spring liquid!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The deep spring liquid on the periphery has no effect on him now, but the deep spring liquid here still has a great effect on him.

As time passed, Ye Tian continued to absorb and refine these high-quality deep spring liquids, and the increase in his life level was definitely not small.

this day.

Ye Tian was refining the deep spring liquid as usual.

Suddenly, the entire deep spring abyss shook.

Tear and pull!

The endless space-time was torn apart by a pair of claws, and a pair of huge pupils appeared.

At this moment, a large number of half-step sevenfold ancestors who were in the deep spring abyss trembled, unable to move at all.

"It's ......"

Although Ye Tian didn't know what this was, this was definitely not at the level of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and even the Half-Step Eightfold Primordial Ancestor was far inferior to this mysterious existence.

He had also seen the half-step Eightfold Ancestor make a move, and compared to this mysterious existence, it was like an ant.

"The lowest is also the level of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and it is definitely not the kind that has just broken through, I am afraid that it is very powerful among the Eightfold Primordial Ancestors!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to think about it, after all, the level of the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor and the Ninefold Origin Ancestor was too far away from him.

And under the suppression of the opponent's power, his copying talent could not spy on the opponent's location, so he could not probe it.

Just as this mysterious existence was about to make a move on them, a sword light crossed over and directly pierced through this mysterious existence.

The next moment, the mysterious presence dissipated.

The crisis is over!

At this time, the half-step sevenfold ancestors were like the rest of their lives, and they were very happy one by one, and they began to discuss.

Ye Tian also tried to communicate with the other half-step sevenfold ancestors, and soon knew the identity of the mysterious existence just now.

"The Black Abyss Behemoth of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Realm!"

In the black abyss, there are not a few black abyss giant beasts, this black abyss giant beast is also a kind of primordial antiquity, the size is extremely huge, like to devour cultivators, the more cultivators devour, the size of this primordial antiquity will become, and the strength will also increase, it is a very special primordial antiquity.

"If you kill the Black Abyss Giant Beast at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor with one sword, it should be a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The matter of the Black Abyss Behemoth is just a small episode, and everyone is still absorbing the deep spring liquid to improve their life level.

Ye Tian also continued to absorb the refining deep spring liquid, and he didn't think about it.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

At this time, the Guquan Xuanlou Mansion's master Sword Dao Ancestor had a ball of blood in his hand, and this ball of blood was the true blood from the body of the Black Abyss Giant Beast.

"The Black Abyss Giant Beast was almost killed last time, but I didn't expect another one to appear this time, what should I do with this mass of Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood?"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor hesitated a little.

This thing is of no use to him, but for a half-step sevenfold ancestor, the value is too great!

The true blood of the Black Abyss Behemoth can increase the life level of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, and of course, it can also increase the life level of the Sevenfold Ancestor and even the ordinary Eightfold Ancestor.

But under normal circumstances, the Nine-Fold Building will definitely be used to cultivate a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, and cultivating a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor with a life level of 9 is more valuable than cultivating more Sevenfold Ancestors and Eightfold Ancestors!

"Hand it over to the Nine-Fold Building, and let those Ninefold Ancestors decide what to do with it!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor decided.

Of course, he felt that the true blood of these black ape giant beasts would definitely be used as a reward for the half-step sevenfold origin ancestors, and it would be used to cultivate those half-step sevenfold ancestors.

But how to reward it, that's not his responsibility.

Soon.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor sent the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast.

......

The years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found that the deep spring liquid in the Deep Spring Abyss was of little help to him, and he had already come to the deepest part of the Deep Spring Abyss.

Moreover, the time is about the same.

So, Ye Tian left the Deep Spring Abyss directly and returned to the Hanhai Yellow Tower.

After coming back, Ye Tian came to test his life level for the first time.

Soon, the test results came in.

“7.8！"

Seeing this result, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Before, he was only 7.1 life level, but now it has been increased to 7.8, which is directly increased by 0.7!

It doesn't seem to have improved much, but above 7.1, every 0.1 increase is extremely difficult, even the ancient river of life is useless, and the life source bead is useless.

Therefore, his promotion this time was enough to make the other half-step sevenfold ancestors of the Nine-Story Building envious and jealous.

"If the life level reaches 8, and then complete the assessment task of the Xuanlou, you can apply to join a Xuanlou!

Ye Tian muttered.

Just as he was about to go to another treasure land, the Nine-Folded Building issued an order for all the half-step Sevenfold Ancestors of the Yellow Mansion to go to any of the Xuanlou.

The Nine-Story Building has an opportunity to face all the half-step sevenfold ancestors.

After getting this news, Ye Tian immediately came to the Guquan Xuanlou, he had been here once, so he still chose to come to this Xuanlou.
